title: PARENTING CLASSES - 211info
text: OPTIONS COUNSELING AND FAMILY SERVICES FLORENCE PARENTING CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides community-based parenting classes to support parents in navigating parenthood, managing child behaviors, and connecting with other parents. 1445 8th Street Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: Ages 0-14 and their parents or caregivers Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 997-6261 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 997-6261 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. Some classes may require referral from a therapist. FEES: Varies by class DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Douglas, Lane, Marion, Polk, and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Services: Parenting Skills Classes Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTIONS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - IN-HOME SAFETY AND REUNIFICATION SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
